steps.title: Distribute and combine like terms
steps.content: Combine the $x^2$ terms:$$-5x^2-2x^2=-7x^2$$The variable part of the expression simplifies to $-7x^2$.

steps.title: Match to the answer choices
steps.content: The matching $x^2$-term simplification is $-7x^2$. That matches choice B — B is correct.
